issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which indicates DuringYourTurn, not EndOfTurn. Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' to match the effect lasting for the current turn phase.

Target allows choosing up to 1 opponent character, but DSL uses ChooseOpponentCharacter without explicit 'up to' constraint. Should clarify max:1 if scope doesn't inherently limit to single selection.
